prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Mazda KF-ZE (2.0L V6 24V DOHC, 200ps)** with a **Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger**, custom **Tomei 260° camshafts**, and a **HKS Hi-Power exhaust manifold** paired with a **GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller** for 0.8 bar of boost, targeting 320ps at the wheels. Supporting mods include a **Nismo 555cc fuel injector set** and a **Walbro 255LPH fuel pump** with an **AEM F/IC 6 piggyback ECU** for precise fuel mapping.

Full **Cusco Type-RS 8-point bolt-in roll cage** with integrated **Sparco Pro 2000 6-point harness bar** for chassis rigidity, paired with **Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers** (custom valved for the MS-8’s **FCS platform** with **Eibach ERS springs** at 8kg/mm front and 7kg/mm rear). Braking upgraded to **Endless CC-R6 brake pads** with **DBA 5000 Series rotors** and **AP Racing CP5556-2600 calipers** for 330mm front and 300mm rear setups.

Drivetrain reinforcement with a **PPG 6-speed dog engagement gearset** (close-ratio, 4.1:1 final drive) in the **Mazda G5M-R transmission**, paired with a **OS Giken Super Lock LSD** (2.2-way, 65% lockup) and a **Spec Stage 3+ clutch** with a **Fidanza aluminum flywheel**. The **Mazda FCS subframe** is reinforced with **Cusco subframe collars** and **polyurethane bushings** (Energy Suspension 9.5111G) for reduced drivetrain deflection.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit** (MS-8-specific, 30mm front/40mm rear fender flares) with **custom carbon fiber overfenders** (Seibon CFRP, 2x2 twill weave) and a **Veilside Fortune 03 rear diffuser** (modified to fit the MS-8’s **JDM-spec rear bumper**). Front lip upgraded to a **C-West J-10** with **custom canards** (3D-printed ABS, 150mm length) and a **Mazdaspeed IMSA-style hood** (carbon fiber, vented for the KF-ZE intercooler setup).

**Work Meister S1 3P 18x9.5 +38 front / 18x10.5 +45 rear wheels** (ET adjusted via **Rays Engineering 5mm spacers**) wrapped in **Yokohama Advan A052 tires** (245/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear). Fender gap minimized via **custom wheel arches** (hand-rolled, 10mm reduction) and **polyurethane fender liners** (BeatRush FL-01).

**Full JDM Efini MS-8 VIP conversion**: **Toyota Aristo JZS161 rear spoiler** (modified with a **custom carbon fiber gurney flap**), **Mazdaspeed side skirts** (extended 20mm for ground clearance), and **OEM Efini MS-8 Type II taillights** (clear smoked, **Morimoto LED retrofits**). Interior features **Recaro SRD-E seats** (MS-8-specific mounts) with **Takata Drift II harnesses**, a **Nardi Classic 380mm steering wheel** (Momo quick-release hub), and **custom door cards** (retrimmed in **Bridge of Weir leather** with **Alcantara inserts**).
